title: Global markets fall on fears of AI spending and oil escalation
summary: Stock markets in the US and Asia post steep losses following Alphabet and Tesla results and oil rebound.

title: Oil surpasses $100 amid geopolitical tensions in the Middle East
summary: Crude reaches $100 after US threats to attack Iran and Houthi attacks on Saudi ships, triggering massive bond sell-offs.

title: ECB holds rates at 2.25% and anticipates a hike in September
summary: The European Central Bank pauses hikes but signals a possible 0.25-point increase at the next meeting.

title: ECB opens public consultation to choose the design of new euro banknotes
summary: Proposals range from birds and composers to European cultural landscapes.

title: Allianz buys HSBC's life insurance unit in Singapore for $2.1 billion
summary: The German insurer acquires HSBC's Asian business to strengthen its presence in the region.

title: Strategies to bet on the rise of the S&P 500
summary: Two articles explain how to position bullish on the US index.

title: Distressed private credit funds represent an opportunity for secondary investors
summary: Stress in private credit opens investment opportunities in the secondary market.

title: Blackstone's profits soar 61% thanks to AI and outflows from its flagship fund slow
summary: The private equity firm reports record results driven by artificial intelligence and announces a slowdown in withdrawals.

title: Yen falls to 163 per dollar, its lowest level in more than 39 years
summary: The Japanese currency depreciates to 163 units against the greenback, affecting Asian markets.
